blocks.heading: Aboard the Pantagruel
blocks.content:
After the opening event scene, you find yourself aboard the Pantagruel. Each room with a **red exclamation mark** contains a character to visit. Speak to everyone to advance the story:

- **Scarlet** — South Area, Southeast Room
- **Vulcan** — South Area, Northeast Room
- **Bleublanc** — Dining Table, Center
- **Xeno & Leonidas** — North Area, Southeast Room
- **McBurn** — North Area, Northeast Room
- **Duvalie** — North Area, Southwest Room
- **Altina** — North Area, Northwest Room

Visit all seven rooms to trigger the next story event.

checkpoints.label: Spoke to all characters on the Pantagruel

blocks.heading: Spirit Unification & Air Duct Escape
blocks.content: After speaking with everyone, head to the **second floor** and go north to the guest room. Knock on the door to trigger an event scene—**Rean** obtains the **Spirit Unification** ability. Once the scene concludes, head downstairs to your room in the **South Area, Southwest corner**. Examine the **air ducts** next to the flower vase to begin your escape. Proceed through the ducts to face a series of battles with only Rean and Alfin in your party.

blocks.name: Alliance Forces Soldiers
blocks.heading: Battle: Alliance Forces Soldiers

stats.Alliance Forces Soldier x2: HP 9,600 each | All elements 100% | All unbalance ★☆☆☆ | Drops: Teara Balm, EP Charge II

blocks.strategy: These soldiers deal significant damage and can heal themselves with arts. Use **Alfin's arts** to destroy them in roughly three hits. Cancel the soldiers' casting with **Rean's Autumn Leaf Cutter** to prevent healing. Keep Rean's HP high at all times—use Alfin to heal if he drops low. The fight is manageable as long as you interrupt their arts consistently.

blocks.heading: Air Duct Treasures & Navigation
blocks.content:
As you work through the duct corridors, collect the following treasures before reaching the exit:

- **Celestial Balm** — West Room
- **Orange Cape** — East Room
- **Tearal Balm** — East Room

After clearing the ducts, you'll reach an area near the Orbment Charging Station. Use it to restore EP before the upcoming boss fight.

checkpoints.label: Collected all duct treasures and reached the exit

blocks.name: Duvalie & Bleublanc
blocks.heading: Boss: Duvalie & Bleublanc

stats.Duvalie: HP 85,316 | All elements 90% | Unbalance: Thrust ★☆☆☆, Strike ★☆☆☆
stats.Bleublanc: HP 96,640 | All elements 90% | Unbalance: Slash ★☆☆☆, Strike ★☆☆☆

blocks.strategy: Scan both bosses immediately for bestiary entries. The win condition is simple: reduce **either** boss to **50% HP** to end the fight. One well-placed **S-Craft** will deal nearly enough damage on its own—follow up with a few regular attacks to finish. Target whichever boss you prefer; Duvalie has slightly less HP making her the easier target.

blocks.name: Crow
blocks.heading: Final Boss: Crow (1-on-1)

stats.Crow: HP 96,640 | All elements 90% | Unbalance: Slash ★☆☆☆ only

blocks.strategy:
This is a solo duel between Rean and Crow. Exchange attacks normally and watch the turn order—if you see a **turn bonus** (Critical, etc.), use your **S-Craft** immediately to capitalize on the bonus damage.

**Critical Warning:** When Crow's HP drops below **50%**, he may unleash his S-Craft which can instantly kill Rean. Before pushing him past the threshold, ensure your HP is **above 7,000**. Heal preemptively if needed. As long as you survive his S-Craft, you can finish the fight with normal attacks afterward.
